releases.title: Break Technology To Trance
releases.blurb: Machine-funk broken down into pure trance — the label's opening statement.
releases.description:
The record that opens the catalogue. Broken machine rhythms are worn down over eight minutes until only the trance is left — hardware sequences fed back on themselves, mixed hot, mastered honest.

NENTOKE 001. Pressed loud.

releases.title: A Thousand Feet Under
releases.blurb: Subterranean drones and shivering voice — a descent, cut deep to wax.
releases.description:
A single long descent: drones, field recordings and processed voice pulled a thousand feet below the surface. Recorded in one take, cut deep to wax.

NENTOKE 002. Limited vinyl LP.
tracklist: A — A Thousand Feet Under (Part I)
B — A Thousand Feet Under (Part II)

releases.title: Ishull Rezonant
releases.blurb: A resonant island — rooms treated as instruments, tuned and struck.
releases.description:
Rooms treated as instruments: struck, tuned, and left to ring. A four-track EP built entirely from resonances captured on location.

NENTOKE 003. Digital EP.

releases.title: Dervaza
releases.blurb: The door to hell as a dancefloor — molten, hypnotic, twelve-inch weight.
releases.description:
Named for the crater that has burned for half a century. Molten low-end and hypnotic percussion built for long, dark rooms.

NENTOKE 004. Vinyl 12".
